task_completion.description: Navigate to the JFrog Artifactory URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:8082' and the JFrog Artifactory interface (login or home page) is visible.

task_completion.description: Log in to Artifactory using the provided credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory interface shows the user is logged in as 'admin' (typically visible in the top right corner or user profile section).
The 'Artifacts' or 'Application' section is open, and the 'example-repo-local' repository is selected or visible in the repository tree.

task_completion.description: Open the deployment or upload dialog for the target repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Deploy' or 'Upload' modal/dialog is open on the screen, indicating preparation to upload a file to 'example-repo-local'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct JAR artifact for deployment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'commons-io-2.15.1.jar' is visible in the upload queue, file selection input, or target path field within the Deploy dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the artifact is successfully deployed to the repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The artifact 'commons-io-2.15.1.jar' is successfully listed inside the 'example-repo-local' repository in the Artifactory repository browser.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) being used to navigate the Artifactory UI, rather than terminal commands like curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the file system to upload the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a file picker dialog or drag-and-drop action from the '/home/ga/artifacts/commons-io/' directory, showing genuine interaction with the OS file system.

integrity.description: The results are shown in the genuine Artifactory web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The final success state must be viewed within the standard JFrog Artifactory web UI, not a text editor, terminal output, or spoofed HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: http://localhost:8082. Credentials: admin / password. Target repository: 'example-repo-local'. Artifact file path: '/home/ga/artifacts/commons-io/commons-io-2.15.1.jar'. Artifact name: 'commons-io-2.15.1.jar'.
